name: parallax
description: Governed trading thesis council with lifecycle monitoring, paper trading, and permissioned execution gates.

scripts.analyze: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js analyze
scripts.policy: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js policy
